title: ZUMBA GOLD VIRTUAL - 211info
text: CARECONNECT USA ZUMBA GOLD VIRTUAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides live, virtual Zumba classes endowed by the AARP. 2019 Sandy Pond Lane Waxhaw, NC 28173 Eligibility: Unrestricted, however classes are generally for older adults Hours: Monday, Wednesday, Friday 8am-9am Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to sign up online FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Exercise Classes/Groups Exercise Classes/Groups * Older Adults Physical Activity and Fitness Education/Promotion Physical Activity and Fitness Education/Promotion * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: ASSISTIVE TECHNOLOGY EQUIPMENT - AFFORDABLE HEARING AID HELPLINE CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - COLLECTION COMPLAINT HOTLINE MONEY MANAGEMENT - HELPLINES FOR FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
